raw_text: A security vulnerability has been detected in Tenda FH1202 1.2.0.14(408). Impacted is the function formWrlsafeset of the file /goform/AdvSetWrlsafeset. Such manipulation of the argument mit_ssid/mit_ssid_index leads to stack-based buffer overflow. The attack can be launched remotely. The exploit has been disclosed publicly and may be used.
